      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Logger LogService.getLog(Class clazz)
      Creates a logger for logging from the given class.
      static Logger LogFactory.getLogger()
      Deprecated. 
      Use Scope.getLog(Class)
      static Logger LogFactory.getLogger(String ignored)
      Deprecated. 
      Use Scope.getLog(Class)
